# PHIL.174 ? Pre-Mortem Thinking

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** risk_management
**Subcategory:** pre_mortem_thinking
**Domain:** RISK_MANAGEMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Imagine failure and work backward to identify risks

## Application
Assume failure, identify causes, mitigate risks proactively, plan contingencies
